positive: A highly detailed and symmetrical botanical celestial arrangement. Center composition featuring a large, luminous crescent moon intertwined with glowing, bioluminescent flora, such as nebula-infused orchid petals and trailing cosmic vines. The style should be highly stylized, resembling Art Nouveau meets deep space science fiction. Use strong, saturated jewel tones (deep indigo, electric cyan, emerald green, gold). The overall composition must have clean, defined silhouettes, emphasizing positive space for apparel printing. Lighting should be dramatic and internal (luminescence), casting soft, deep shadows for high contrast. Minimal background noise, focused on the central structure. Vector-illustration quality, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, noisy, grain, amateur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, out of frame, signature, logo, poorly drawn, smudge, gradient, photo-realistic
